2603.26067.title: R-PGA: Robust Physical Adversarial Camouflage Generation via Relightable 3D Gaussian Splatting
2603.26067.paper_summary: Physical adversarial camouflage poses a severe security threat to autonomous driving systems by mapping adversarial textures onto 3D objects. Nevertheless, current methods remain brittle in complex dynamic scenarios, failing to generalize across diverse geometric (e.g., viewing configurations) and radiometric (e.g., dynamic illumination, atmospheric scattering) variations. We attribute this deficiency to two fundamental limitations in simulation and optimization. First, the reliance on coarse, oversimplified simulations (e.g., via CARLA) induces a significant domain gap, confining optimization to a biased feature space. Second, standard strategies targeting average performance result in a rugged loss landscape, leaving the camouflage vulnerable to configuration shifts.To bridge these gaps, we propose the Relightable Physical 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) based Attack framework (R-PGA). Technically, to address the simulation fidelity issue, we leverage 3DGS to ensure photo-realistic reconstruction and augment it with physically disentangled attributes to decouple intrinsic material from lighting. Furthermore, we design a hybrid rendering pipeline that leverages precise Relightable 3DGS for foreground rendering, while employing a pre-trained image translation model to synthesize plausible relighted backgrounds that align with the relighted foreground.To address the optimization robustness issue, we propose the Hard Physical Configuration Mining (HPCM) module, designed to actively mine worst-case physical configurations and suppress their corresponding loss peaks. This strategy not only diminishes the overall loss magnitude but also effectively flattens the rugged loss landscape, ensuring consistent adversarial effectiveness and robustness across varying physical configurations.
2603.26067.paper_summary_zh: 物理對抗偽裝對自動駕駛系統構成了嚴重的安全威脅，通過將對抗性紋理映射到3D物體上。然而，當前的方法在複雜的動態場景中仍然脆弱，無法在多樣的幾何（例如，視角配置）和輻射（例如，動態照明、大氣散射）變化中進行泛化。我們將這一缺陷歸因於模擬和優化中的兩個基本限制。首先，依賴粗糙、過於簡化的模擬（例如，通過CARLA）會引入顯著的領域差距，使優化局限於偏見特徵空間。其次，針對平均性能的標準策略導致崎嶇的損失地形，讓偽裝容易受到配置變化的影響。為了彌補這些差距，我們提出了可重光的物理3D高斯點雲（3DGS）基於攻擊框架（R-PGA）。在技術上，為了解決模擬真實性問題，我們利用3DGS確保照片真實的重建，並通過物理上解耦的屬性來增強它，以將內在材料與照明分離。此外，我們設計了一個混合渲染管道，利用精確的可重光3DGS進行前景渲染，同時使用預訓練的圖像轉換模型合成與重光前景一致的可信重光背景。為了解決優化穩健性問題，我們提出了硬物理配置挖掘（HPCM）模塊，旨在主動挖掘最壞情況的物理配置並抑制其相應的損失峰值。這一策略不僅減少了整體損失幅度，還有效地平坦了崎嶇的損失地形，確保在不同物理配置下對抗效果和穩健性的一致性。
2603.26067.author: Tianrui Lou et.al.
2603.26067.authors: Tianrui Lou, Siyuan Liang, Jiawei Liang, Yuze Gao, Xiaochun Cao
